### Summary

Provide a short description of the change and why it was needed.

### Type of change

- [ ] Bugfix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore

### Checklist

- [ ] Build passes (dotnet build)
- [ ] Tests pass (dotnet test)
- [ ] Frontend build passes (cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build)
- [ ] Linting and formatting applied
- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] Updated documentation (README, FIXES.md)

### Related issues

Closes: # (issue number)
